basic_details.job_title: GIFSA Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 26 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Government Institute of Forensic Science (GIFSA) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released for the recruitment of 26 Assistant Professor vacancies in various forensic science disciplines. Eligible candidates are invited to attend the walk-in interview scheduled on 22 June 2026 as part of the GIFSA Recruitment 2026 process.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. Forensic Science along with NET/SET/Ph.D., M.Sc. with specialization in relevant subject along with NET/SET/Ph.D., M.Sc./M.A. in relevant subject along with NET/SET/Ph.D.
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Forensic Science): M.Sc. Forensic Science along with NET/ SET/ Ph.D. Assistant Professor (Forensic Chemistry): M.Sc. Forensic Science with specialization in Forensic Chemistry and Toxicology OR M.Sc. Organic /Inorganic/ Physical/ Analytical Chemistry along with NET/ SET/ Ph.D. Assistant Professor (Forensic Biology): M.Sc. Forensic Science with specialization in Forensic Biology, Serology and DNA Fingerprinting OR M.Sc. Botany/Zoology/ Biotechnology/Biochemistry/microbiology along with NET/ SET/ Ph.D. Assistant Professor (Digital and Cyber Forensics): M.Sc. Computer Science/ IT OR MCA. OR M.Sc. Forensic Science with specialization in Digital and Cyber Forensics and IT Security along with NET/ SET/ Ph.D. Assistant Professor (Forensics Physics): M.Sc. Physics OR M.Sc. Forensic Science with specialization in Forensic Physics along with NET/ SET/ Ph.D. Assistant Professor (Forensics Psychology): M.A. Psychology OR M.Sc. Forensic Science along with NET/ SET/ Ph.D.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Assistant Professor posts at GIFSA?
faq.answer: There are a total of 26 vacancies for the Assistant Professor positions at the Government Institute of Forensic Science (GIFSA) for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the mode of application for GIFSA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online beforehand.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the Walk-in Interview for GIFSA Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 22 June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications include M.Sc. Forensic Science along with NET/SET/Ph.D., or M.Sc./M.A. in a relevant subject with NET/SET/Ph.D., depending on the specialization.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for GIFSA Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the Assistant Professor positions at GIFSA?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the Walk-in Interview for GIFSA Recruitment 2026 be conducted?
faq.answer: The interview will be conducted at Government Institute of Forensic Science, Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar, Maharashtra, 431004.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Assistant Professor posts at GIFSA?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply for multiple specializations if they meet the criteria?
faq.answer: While the notification doesn't explicitly state this, it's advisable to check the official notification for any specific guidelines regarding applying for multiple posts or specializations.
